GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks close to the module using vitest run
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Cross-package integration surfaces touched by the current wave
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Full monorepo regression via pnpm test
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, cookies, auth headers, session tokens, or raw high-risk payloads. Redact query strings in URLs.
GlobalPolicy.trace-collection: Tests inject a TraceCollector via the module's log parameter. The collector captures structured log entries keyed by [Module][function][BLOCK_NAME]. Assertions verify presence, absence, and order of block markers.

evidence-hierarchy.level-1: Deterministic value assertions (return values, state, types)
evidence-hierarchy.level-2: Trace assertions (block markers appeared, in correct order, forbidden blocks absent)
evidence-hierarchy.level-4: Semantic trace evaluation (only when domain correctness cannot be expressed with exact asserts)

logger-interface.purpose: Each module that needs traceability accepts an optional log callback: (msg: string) => void
logger-interface.required-structured-fields: At minimum: correlationId or assetId when available, and phase or resultStatus when applicable.

redaction-rules.rule-3: Never log Authorization headers Redact query strings in logged URLs: replace ? and everything after with [REDACTED] Never log base64 attachment data (only log metadata: id, mimeType, suggestedName, size estimate)

test-utility.name: TraceCollector
test-utility.purpose: Capture structured log entries during tests. Provide assertion helpers for block presence, absence, order, and field values.

VF-001.NAME: FullClipHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User clips an authenticated page with 5 images; all images download and save locally; markdown links rewritten to wikilinks.
VF-001.expected-outcome: Note created in vault with 5 local attachments and correct wikilink references; frontmatter with source meta and assets_saved=5.

required-signals.trace-sequence: BLOCK_DISCOVER_ASSETS -> BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET -> BLOCK_BUILD_PACKAGE -> BLOCK_TRANSPORT -> BLOCK_RECEIVE -> BLOCK_WRITE_FILE -> BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS -> BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE -> RETURNED

VF-002.NAME: PartialSuccess
VF-002.scenario: 2 of 5 images fail to download; note still saves with 3 local attachments and failure report.
VF-002.expected-outcome: Note saved; frontmatter shows assets_saved=3, assets_failed=2; failed assets marked with HTML comment in markdown.

required-signals.trace-sequence: BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET -> (2x FETCH_FAILED) -> BLOCK_BUILD_PACKAGE -> BLOCK_RECEIVE -> BLOCK_WRITE_FILE -> BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS -> BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE -> RETURNED
required-signals.forbidden-block: BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE must NOT be absent (note must still be created despite partial failures)

VF-003.NAME: NameConflictResolution
VF-003.scenario: Clip a page where attachment filename conflicts with existing vault file.
VF-003.expected-outcome: generateSafeName appends counter suffix; no overwrite; note links to new name.

VF-004.NAME: PluginUnavailable
VF-004.scenario: Extension attempts to send package but Obsidian plugin is not running.
VF-004.expected-outcome: TransportError with code PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE; clear error shown to user.
VF-004.evidence-type: Level-1 (error type and code) + Level-2 (block marker)

VF-005.NAME: TokenRedaction
VF-005.scenario: Clip a page with sensitive query params and auth cookies.
VF-005.expected-outcome: No tokens, cookies, or auth headers appear in any log output or frontmatter.

required-signals.assertion: All log outputs pass redaction check — no auth headers, cookies, tokens, or base64 data.

VF-006.NAME: AuthTokenRejection
VF-006.scenario: Plugin has auth token configured; request arrives without valid token.
VF-006.expected-outcome: HTTP 401 with MANIFEST_INVALID error; no vault writes.

required-signals.forbidden-block: BLOCK_WRITE_FILE must NOT appear in trace (no vault writes on auth failure)

VF-007.NAME: ManifestValidation
VF-007.scenario: Invalid CapturePackage sent to plugin (missing fields, wrong version).
VF-007.expected-outcome: Rejected with MANIFEST_INVALID or MANIFEST_VERSION_MISMATCH; no vault writes.

required-signals.forbidden-block: BLOCK_WRITE_FILE must NOT appear (no vault writes on validation failure)

VF-008.NAME: TraceOrdering
VF-008.scenario: Within a clip transaction, BLOCK_RECEIVE appears before BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE, and BLOCK_WRITE_FILE appears before BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS.
VF-008.expected-outcome: assertMarkerBefore passes for both order pairs.

scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid CapturePackage rejected with descriptive Zod error.
scenarios.scenario-3: ResultReport serialization round-trips correctly (parse -> serialize -> parse).
scenarios.scenario-4: sanitizeFilename removes unsafe characters, handles edge cases (path traversal, control chars, Unicode).
scenarios.scenario-6: extractFilenameFromUrl handles data:, blob:, query strings, encoded paths.
scenarios.scenario-7: buildResultStatus returns correct status for all combinations (success, partial, failed).

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: Validation failure must not emit downstream processing blocks.

V-M-SHARED-TYPES.coverage-assessment: All scenarios have value-assertion test coverage. Scenario-3 round-trip test could be strengthened. No trace assertions needed at this level (shared-types is a utility layer without side effects).
V-M-SHARED-TYPES.wave-follow-up: Integration check against clipper-fork and obsidian-plugin consuming shared types.
V-M-SHARED-TYPES.phase-follow-up: Full regression suite across all packages.

scenarios.scenario-1: Template with variables and filters renders correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid template syntax produces parse error with line/column.
scenarios.scenario-4: validateVariables detects unknown variables and suggests corrections.
scenarios.scenario-5: validateFilters detects unknown filters and suggests corrections.

V-M-TEMPLATE-ENGINE.coverage-assessment: Well-covered with co-located filter tests. Trace assertions not critical for this module.
V-M-TEMPLATE-ENGINE.wave-follow-up: Check template rendering in clipper-fork note generation.

scenarios.scenario-1: discoverAssets finds img[src], img[srcset], picture source[srcset] elements.
scenarios.scenario-2: parseSrcset handles descriptors, multiple URLs, empty input.
scenarios.scenario-3: fetchAssets downloads image data as base64 with credentials: include. BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET emitted per asset.
scenarios.scenario-4: fetchAssets on 403 returns FETCH_FORBIDDEN per asset. Failed fetch emits FETCH_FORBIDDEN in log.
scenarios.scenario-6: buildCapturePackage produces valid CapturePackage with correct linkMap.
scenarios.scenario-8: sendCapturePackage POSTs to correct URL with optional auth header. BLOCK_TRANSPORT emitted.
scenarios.scenario-9: sendCapturePackage to offline server throws TransportError(PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE). BLOCK_TRANSPORT emits PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE.
scenarios.scenario-10: checkHealth returns true for running server, false otherwise.
scenarios.scenario-11: fetchAssets mixed success/failure: BLOCK_FETCH_ASSET emitted for each asset, FETCH_FAILED emitted only for failures.
scenarios.scenario-12: Redaction: no auth token, cookies, or sensitive values appear in any captured log entry.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: Failed fetch must not prevent remaining assets from being fetched.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-2: No auth headers or cookies in any log output.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-3: transport.test.ts exists and covers checkHealth + sendCapturePackage success + failure.

coverage-gaps.gap-1: No cross-package integration test connecting clipper-fork to obsidian-plugin in a single test.

V-M-CLIPPER-FORK.wave-follow-up: Integration test with Obsidian plugin receiver.
V-M-CLIPPER-FORK.phase-follow-up: End-to-end test with live browser extension.

scenarios.scenario-2: validateCapturePackage rejects invalid JSON with MANIFEST_INVALID. BLOCK_VALIDATE emitted with error.
scenarios.scenario-3: validateCapturePackage rejects wrong major version with MANIFEST_VERSION_MISMATCH.
scenarios.scenario-4: writeAttachment decodes base64 and writes binary to vault path. BLOCK_WRITE_FILE emitted.
scenarios.scenario-5: writeAttachment returns WRITE_FAILED on vault error. BLOCK_WRITE_FILE emits failure.
scenarios.scenario-6: rewriteMarkdown converts markdown image URLs to wikilinks. BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS emitted.
scenarios.scenario-7: rewriteMarkdown converts to relative paths when configured.
scenarios.scenario-9: resolveAttachmentDir works for same-as-note, subfolder, and global strategies.
scenarios.scenario-10: resolveNotePath uses defaultNoteFolder and filename from pathHint.
scenarios.scenario-11: resolveAttachmentPath generates unique names on conflict. BLOCK_RESOLVE_PATH emitted.
scenarios.scenario-12: prependFrontmatter includes all meta fields and asset counts.
scenarios.scenario-13: executeClipTransaction produces correct ResultReport on happy path. BLOCK_RECEIVE and BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE emitted.
scenarios.scenario-14: executeClipTransaction handles partial failures (note still saved). BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE present, BLOCK_WRITE_FILE includes failure for bad attachment.
scenarios.scenario-15: HTTP server rejects invalid auth token with 401. BLOCK_AUTH_CHECK emitted. BLOCK_WRITE_FILE absent.
scenarios.scenario-18: HTTP server rejects oversized body with 413 PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE. No vault writes.
scenarios.scenario-19: HTTP server rejects structurally invalid package with 400. BLOCK_VALIDATE emitted, BLOCK_WRITE_FILE absent.
scenarios.scenario-20: HTTP server accepts capture without auth when authToken is empty.
scenarios.scenario-21: BLOCK_RECEIVE appears before BLOCK_CREATE_NOTE in trace order (assertMarkerBefore).
scenarios.scenario-22: BLOCK_WRITE_FILE appears before BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS in trace order (assertMarkerBefore).
scenarios.scenario-23: resolveAttachmentPath emits BLOCK_RESOLVE_PATH with name and resolved path content.
scenarios.scenario-24: BLOCK_REWRITE_LINKS marker includes mode= and errors= structured content.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: MANIFEST_INVALID must not trigger any vault writes (no BLOCK_WRITE_FILE in trace).
required-trace-assertions.assertion-2: Partial write failure must still produce a note with failure metadata.
required-trace-assertions.assertion-3: No secrets in log output (token redaction check).
required-trace-assertions.assertion-4: Auth token rejection must not trigger vault writes (no BLOCK_WRITE_FILE in trace).
required-trace-assertions.assertion-5: BLOCK_AUTH_CHECK must appear when authToken is configured and request lacks valid token.

coverage-gaps.gap-1: No cross-package integration test connecting clipper-fork POST to obsidian-plugin capture.

V-M-OBSIDIAN-PLUGIN.phase-follow-up: End-to-end test with live Obsidian instance.

VerificationMatrix.purpose: Map each verification plan scenario to its evidence type, test file, and current coverage status.

entry.note: schema validation covered, round-trip serialization not tested

Module-Level.purpose: Worker-local fast checks per package. Run after every module change.
Module-Level.scope: typecheck, lint, unit tests with deterministic assertions, local trace checks

Wave-Level.purpose: Integration checks for merged surfaces touched in the wave. Run after each wave completes.
Wave-Level.scope: Cross-package type compatibility, transport integration (clipper POST to plugin), schema contract alignment

additional-checks.check-1: Verify CapturePackageSchema changes are consumed correctly by both clipper-fork and obsidian-plugin
additional-checks.check-2: Verify transport contract: clipper-fork send matches plugin http-server handleCapture expectations

Phase-Level.purpose: Full regression suite before marking phase done. High confidence gate.
Phase-Level.scope: All packages, all tests, trace sequence verification across critical flows, redaction audit

additional-checks.check-1: Run redaction audit: grep all test-captured logs for secret patterns (token, cookie, authorization, base64 data blocks)
additional-checks.check-2: Verify all VF-xxx critical flow trace sequences pass
additional-checks.check-3: Verify no BLOCK_WRITE_FILE in traces for validation/auth failure paths

Gate-Phase-1.goal: Shared types, schemas, and template engine validated.

commands.command-2: pnpm --filter @authclip/template-engine test pnpm --filter @authclip/shared-types typecheck pnpm --filter @authclip/template-engine typecheck

required-evidence.evidence-2: Template engine renders all standard filters.

Gate-Phase-2.goal: Browser extension discovers, fetches, and packages assets correctly.

required-evidence.evidence-1: Discovery finds all img/src/srcset elements in test DOM.
required-evidence.evidence-4: Transport sends and receives with auth token.
required-evidence.evidence-5: transport.test.ts covers checkHealth + sendCapturePackage success + failure.

Gate-Phase-3.goal: Plugin receives, validates, writes, rewrites, and creates notes end-to-end.

required-evidence.evidence-1: Valid package produces note with correct local links.
required-evidence.evidence-2: Invalid manifest rejected before any vault write.
required-evidence.evidence-3: Partial failure still produces a note.
required-evidence.evidence-4: Auth token rejection returns 401 without vault writes.
required-evidence.evidence-5: Frontmatter contains source meta and asset counts.

Gate-Phase-4.goal: Full integration with hash dedup, CSS bg images, security hardening.

required-evidence.evidence-1: SHA-256 dedup prevents duplicate file creation.
required-evidence.evidence-2: Token redaction passes security audit check.
required-evidence.evidence-4: CSS background-image URLs discovered when enabled.
required-evidence.evidence-5: All module-level and phase-level checks green.
required-evidence.evidence-6: All VF-xxx critical flow trace sequences pass.

FailurePackets.purpose: When verification fails, produce a concise failure packet using the operational-packets.xml FailurePacketTemplate shape.

packet-template.expected-fields: scenario, contract-ref, expected-evidence, observed-evidence, first-divergent-block, suggested-next-action

FailurePacket.expected-evidence: TransportError thrown with code=PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE, BLOCK_TRANSPORT marker present
FailurePacket.observed-evidence: Error thrown with code=PLUGIN_UNAVAILABLE, but no BLOCK_TRANSPORT marker in trace
FailurePacket.suggested-next-action: Add logger call inside BLOCK_TRANSPORT in transport.ts sendCapturePackage function

resolved-blockers.resolved-1: transport.test.ts created with 7 test cases covering checkHealth, sendCapturePackage success/failure, auth token, and redaction.
resolved-blockers.resolved-2: All 10 source modules now accept log parameter and emit structured BLOCK markers at runtime.
resolved-blockers.resolved-3: BLOCK_AUTH_CHECK added to http-server.ts; BLOCK_RESOLVE_PATH added to path-resolver.ts.
resolved-blockers.resolved-4: HTML img tag rewriting tested in markdown-rewriter.test.ts (2 test cases).
resolved-blockers.resolved-5: Redaction audit tests added to transport.test.ts and http-server.test.ts (assertNoSecrets + assertNoMarkerContaining).

remaining-gaps.gap-1: No cross-package integration test connecting clipper-fork POST to obsidian-plugin capture in a single test.
remaining-gaps.gap-2: No full VF-001/VF-002 trace sequence ordering test across package boundaries (assertMarkerBefore only used within clip-transaction.test.ts).
remaining-gaps.gap-3: TraceCollector duplicated between clipper-fork and obsidian-plugin — could be extracted to shared-test-utils.

readiness-criteria.criterion-1: All module-level test commands pass with 0 failures (398 tests, 4 packages).
readiness-criteria.criterion-2: transport.test.ts exists with 7 test cases covering scenarios 8-10, 12.
readiness-criteria.criterion-3: All source modules with BLOCK markers emit structured log entries via log parameter.
readiness-criteria.criterion-4: TraceCollector utility exists in both clipper-fork and obsidian-plugin test suites.
readiness-criteria.criterion-5: VF-001/VF-002 trace sequences verifiable within packages but not across package boundaries.
readiness-criteria.criterion-6: Redaction audit test passes across captured log output in transport.test.ts and http-server.test.ts.
